name: Red Bell Pepper and Cheddar Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Tillamook Cheddar cheese, or other sharp cheddar (grated and packed to measure)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place onion and garlic in a small baking dish.
3. Drizzle with oil.
4. Bake until soft, stirring occasionally, about 50 minutes.
5. Cool.
6. Meanwhile, char peppers over gas flame or under broiler until blackened on all sides.
7. Cool for 10 minutes.
8. Peel and seed the peppers; pat dry.
9. Place all ingredients except chives in a processor.
10. Puree until almost smooth.
11. Transfer to a bowl.
12. Stir in chives.
13. Season with salt and pepper.
14. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead).
15. Makes about 1-1/2 cups. Excellent with crackers, on crusty country bread, or served with a dip with crudites.
